01

Our Legacy

25 Years of Shaping Minds.

"Education is not just about knowledge — it is about character, confidence, and curiosity."

New Era School of Excellence is a premium venture of KTS (Krishnaveni Talent School) — an institution that has proudly shaped young minds for nearly 25 years.

Built on trust, discipline, and academic excellence, KTS has stood as a pillar of quality education for generations of families across Hyderabad.

New Era represents our promise to blend tradition with innovation — so every child grows ready for the world ahead.

🏛️
25 Years of Trust
A proud legacy of KTS School — shaping generations of confident, capable individuals since 1999.
🎓
World-Class Faculty
Skilled, experienced educators committed to individual attention and holistic student development.
🔬
Future-Ready Campus
Fully air-conditioned, tech-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and enriching extracurricular spaces.
02

Smart Learning

Interactive Classrooms
Built for Every Learner.

PRO Series Smart Boards

Touch-enabled interactive flat panels — supports videos, diagrams, quizzes, and live annotations for engaging, visual learning.

Sliding Boards System

Traditional writing meets digital teaching — extra writing space, concept clarity, and reduced screen fatigue for a perfect balance.

Fully Air-Conditioned

Every classroom maintains an ideal learning environment across all seasons — reducing fatigue and improving student focus.

Secure & Transparent Campus

CCTV cameras, digital notice boards, and classroom audio systems ensure safety and peace of mind for every parent.

03

Facilities & Labs

Technology That Supports
Learning, Not Replaces It.

Robotics & AI

Robotics & AI Lab

Hands-on learning with real technology — encouraging innovation, developing logical thinking, and giving early exposure to future careers.

Language & Literacy

English Language Lab

Improves speaking, listening, and pronunciation through interactive role-play and assessments that build communication confidence.

Arts & Languages

French, Music & Dance

Dedicated French faculty, vocal and instrumental music training, and performance-based dance for confident, well-rounded individuals.

04

Beyond Classrooms

A Joyful, Holistic School Life.

🏏 Sports & Leisure

Box cricket, table tennis, chess, and dedicated play areas. Indoor games for focus, coordination, and healthy competitive spirit.

🎭 Personality Development

Structured classes on communication, body language, leadership, emotional intelligence, and social skills development.

🌿 Nature Club

Environmental awareness, gardening, sustainability activities, and field observations that build responsibility and empathy.

🎤 Interactive Club

Public speaking, group activities, leadership games, and creative thinking exercises — encouraging teamwork and confident communication.

📚 Library & Reading Zone

Nearly 1,500 books — academic, story, reference, and value-based — with structured reading programs to build lifelong reading habits.

05

06

Our Commitment

Our Promise to Every Parent.

🛡️

Safe & Secure Campus

CCTV monitoring, supervised spaces, and a nurturing environment where every child is protected.

📖

Strong Academic Foundation

Conceptual clarity, individual attention, and value-based education with an integrated curriculum.

🌟

Holistic Development

Academics, sports, arts, and life skills in balance — developing the whole child, not just scores.

🤝

Parent Partnership

Continuous communication, transparent updates, and an open-door relationship between school and family.

💡

Technology-Enhanced Learning

Smart infrastructure that enhances teaching — technology that supports educators, never replaces them.

🌍

Future-Ready Learners

Building confident, independent, and globally aware students ready to lead and contribute.

❤️

Values & Discipline

Empathy, responsibility, and social consciousness woven into every aspect of school life.

🎯

Individual Attention

Every child's unique learning pace is respected and supported — no child is left behind.
